title: PR 42232 AC5 edit TP/SL modal validation
description: Seed a perps position, open the edit TP/SL modal, and verify stop-loss percent defaulting behavior.

ac5-assert-modal-percent-cases.expression: (async()=>{const modal=document.querySelector('[data-testid="perps-update-tpsl-modal"]');const inputs=[...(modal?.querySelectorAll('input')||[])];const slPercent=inputs[3];const setter=Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLInputElement.prototype,'value').set;const pause=()=>new Promise((resolve)=>setTimeout(resolve,30));const set=async(value)=>{slPercent.focus();setter.call(slPercent,value);slPercent.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));slPercent.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));await pause();return slPercent.value;};const results={};results.ten=await set('10');await set('');results.leading=await set('011');await set('');results.zero=await set('0');await set('');results.plus=await set('+10');const ok=!!modal&&inputs.length>=4&&results.ten==='-10'&&results.leading==='-11'&&results.zero==='0'&&results.plus==='+10';return JSON.stringify({inputCount:inputs.length,results,ok});})()

ac9-modal-set-valid-tpsl.expression: (async()=>{const modal=document.querySelector('[data-testid="perps-update-tpsl-modal"]');const inputs=[...(modal?.querySelectorAll('input')||[])];const tpPrice=inputs[0];const slPrice=inputs[2];const setter=Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLInputElement.prototype,'value').set;const num=(text)=>Number(String(text||'').replace(/[$,]/g,''));const current=num(document.querySelector('[data-testid="perps-market-detail-price"]')?.textContent);const liquidation=num(document.querySelector('[data-testid="perps-position-liquidation-value"]')?.textContent);const tp=(current*1.05).toFixed(2);const sl=((current+liquidation)/2).toFixed(2);for(const [input,value] of [[tpPrice,tp],[slPrice,sl]]){setter.call(input,value);input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));input.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));await new Promise((resolve)=>setTimeout(resolve,30));}const tpError=modal?.querySelector('[data-testid="tp-validation-error"]')?.textContent||'';const slError=modal?.querySelector('[data-testid="sl-validation-error"]')?.textContent||'';const disabled=document.querySelector('[data-testid="perps-update-tpsl-modal-submit"]')?.disabled===true;const ok=current>0&&liquidation>0&&sl>liquidation&&sl<current&&!tpError&&!slError&&!disabled;return JSON.stringify({current,liquidation,tp,sl,tpError,slError,disabled,ok});})()

ac9-screenshot-modal-valid-tpsl.note: AC9: modal valid TP SL enables save
